description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a prominent front porch supported by white columns and a dark gabled roof. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored siding, and the foundation is finished with a stone veneer. The house features multiple window types, including double-hung and picture windows, arranged in an asymmetrical pattern. A driveway leads to a parking area with two vehicles and a walkway to the main entrance, which is accessed by a set of steps. The rear and side elevations show additional entrances and a mix of rooflines, including intersecting gables and a shed roof over a secondary section.
description: A two-story house with a gabled roof, stone foundation, front porch with columns, and asymmetrical window arrangement. The property includes a driveway and parking area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main porch with columns, stone steps, and driveway with two parked vehicles.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the intersecting rooflines, upper-level windows, and a secondary entrance.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the rear elevation, garage area, and the expanse of the roof.
description_view_3: Angled view of the driveway, front porch, and main entry steps, with visible landscaping and vehicles.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a covered porch with white columns, stone steps, and a dark overhanging roof.
